title: hymenophyllum chamaecyparicola
intro: Hymenophyllum chamaecyparicola, also known as the Hymenophyllum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum chamaecyparicola include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Hymenophyllum chamaecyparicola can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried leaves can be used to make a powder for topical application or as a supplement.
